reviews.comment:
Muy buena la comida y abundante. Ensaladas frescas , variadas y súper hamburguesas.

(Translated by Google)
The food was very good and plentiful. Fresh, varied salads and amazing hamburgers.

reviews.comment:
Buena opción en la zona. Esta algo tapada desde la ruta por lo cual no hay tanta gente. Es ACA

(Translated by Google)
Good option in the area. It's somewhat hidden from the road, so it's not very crowded. It's an ACA (Argentine Automobile Club).

reviews.comment:
La limpieza no es el fuerte del.lugar
No trabajan con la app YPF
Personal atento y rápido tanto en playa como bar
Baños amplios

(Translated by Google)
Cleanliness isn't the strong point of this place.
They don't work with the YPF app.
The staff is attentive and fast both on the beach and at the bar.
The restrooms are spacious.
